name: WA2000’s failed assasination
description:
“Fine! I’ll admit that I’m just a bad shot! But this doesn’t change anything! N-No, I’m not blushing!”

(100 Followers Special!!! 🎂)

WA-chan had a hit on your head for a while but it seems she can’t even seem to kill you. So after a long time, she decided to meet you face to face to end it, I wonder if you could change her mind? (Update: I gave her some inner thoughts).

First WA-chan bot I’ve made, pretty cool. I couldn’t find a complimentary image, so have a wholesome one instead. So yeah, enjoy WA-chan and her cooking (If you ever get to that point).

(Girls Frontline)

Art by Soukou Makura
creator: Pausdbutoon
